result.preview:
"DuckDB query execution error (CatalogException): Catalog Error: Scalar Function with name julianday does not exist!
Did you mean "julian"?

LINE 1: SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId, AVG(julianday(c.CompanySignedDate) - julianday(o.CreatedDate...
                                         ^"

args.query:
SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId, AVG(julianday(c.CompanySignedDate) - julianday(o.CreatedDate)) AS avg_cycle
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c
  ON REPLACE(o.ContractID__c, '#', '') = REPLACE(c.Id, '#', '')
WHERE o.CreatedDate >= '2023-04-01' AND o.CreatedDate < '2023-05-01'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY avg_cycle ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId, AVG(julianday(c.CompanySignedDate) - julianday(o.CreatedDate)) AS avg_cycle

WHERE o.CreatedDate >= '2023-04-01' AND o.CreatedDate < '2023-05-01'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY avg_cycle ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId, AVG(julian(c.CompanySignedDate) - julian(o.CreatedDate)) AS avg_cycle
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c
  ON REPLACE(o.ContractID__c, '#', '') = REPLACE(c.Id, '#', '')
WHERE o.CreatedDate >= '2023-04-01' AND o.CreatedDate < '2023-05-01'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY avg_cycle ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId, AVG(julian(c.CompanySignedDate) - julian(o.CreatedDate)) AS avg_cycle
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c
  ON REPLACE(o.ContractID__c, '#', '') = REPLACE(c.Id, '#', '')
WHERE o.CreatedDate >= '2023-04-01' AND o.CreatedDate < '2023-05-01'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY avg_cycle ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId, AVG(julian(CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE)) - julian(CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE))) AS avg_cycle
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c
  ON REPLACE(o.ContractID__c, '#', '') = REPLACE(c.Id, '#', '')
WHERE CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE) >= DATE '2023-04-01'
  AND CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE) < DATE '2023-05-01'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY avg_cycle ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId, AVG(julian(CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE)) - julian(CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE))) AS avg_cycle
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c
  ON REPLACE(o.ContractID__c, '#', '') = REPLACE(c.Id, '#', '')
WHERE CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE) >= DATE '2023-04-01'
  AND CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE) < DATE '2023-05-01'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY avg_cycle ASC
LIMIT 1;
